title: PII / privacy filter: block personal-data ingestion + republication; aggregate/PD/CC only
context: Open-web ingestion risks pulling in personal data; the Elyos privacy guardrail requires a conservative no-personal-data stance. This M3 task implements the PII/privacy filter that blocks personal-data ingestion and republication, allowing only aggregate/PD/CC content, complementing the license gate.
objective: Implement the PII/privacy filter that blocks ingestion and republication of personal data, permitting only aggregate/public-domain/CC content, with tests proving personal-data is neither ingested nor surfaced.
acceptanceCriteria: Blocks ingestion of personal data and prevents its republication in any surfaced artifact; only aggregate / PD / CC content is permitted
A test proves personal-data inputs are rejected at ingestion and never surfaced in the synthesis or ledger
Operates together with the license gate (privacy + license both checked before ingestion)
